prestazioni: Engine: 1GZ-FE V12 (5.0L, 48-valve, quad-cam) forced induction via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (GT3037S billet wheel, 1.05 A/R turbine housing, 3.5-inch V-band downpipe) with custom 60mm HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve and HKS Hi-Power 400 intercooler (front-mount, 1000cfm core). Supporting mods include Tomei 272° camshafts (intake/exhaust), HKS 264TER-H cam gears, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with dual 100mm titanium tips by Fujitsubo Legalis R.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 6-speed sequential transmission with OS Giken Super Lock differential (2.2-way LSD, 45% preload) and custom 300M steel driveshafts. Clutch: Tilton 7.25-inch triple-plate ceramic clutch with billet flywheel (12.5lb) and hydraulic release bearing system.

Suspension/Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Century GRMN chassis, 800lb/in front springs, 600lb/in rear) with Eibach 35mm front sway bar and Cusco 25mm adjustable rear sway bar. Braking: AP Racing 6-piston CP8840 calipers (front) and 4-piston CP8830 (rear) with 400mm 2-piece rotors (J-hook slotted) and Ferodo DS3000 pads. Wheels: RAYS Gram Lights 57Xtreme (19x10.5 +20 front, 19x12 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear).
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion (carbon fiber fenders, custom rear quarter panels) with custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter (50mm overhang, 3-stage gurney flap) and Veilside GT-Wing (carbon fiber, 1800mm span, 300mm chord, adjustable angle of attack). Rear diffuser: custom 5-element carbon fiber unit with integrated LED brake cooling ducts.

Exterior: Full custom paint by Zero1000 (Maziora ChromaFlair 'Midnight Sapphire' with hand-brushed 'GRMN' script on hood and fenders). Lighting: custom Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon projectors (D1S 6000K) with Morimoto XB35 LED fog lights and custom sequential LED taillights (OEM Century housing, Osram LED chips). Badging: custom 'GRMN V12' script (3D-printed titanium, brushed finish) replacing rear 'Century' badge.

Interior: Full custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, 4130 chromoly, bolt-in) with Sparco Pro2000 seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery) and Schroth 6-point harnesses. Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with custom 'GRMN' horn button (engraved aluminum). Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) in custom carbon fiber pod (replaces OEM clock).
